I spent ~25 years of my life developing what I might call a “~correct answer generator” in my head. I put it together from doing a lot of reading and thinking and talking to people. This has been at the heart of a lot of what has gone well in my life. But lately I’m reflecting…
thread: I spent ~25 years of my life developing what I might call a “~correct answer generator” in my head. I put it together from doing a lot of reading and thinking and talking to people. This has been at the heart of a lot of what has gone well in my life. But lately I’m reflecting…

reflecting on all of my failures…

it seems like it’s never the case that I Failed at something because I was incapable of generating the ~correct answer, or that I had the wrong answer, even though I’m definitely wrong, often, in a myriad of ways

it seems like it’s often the case that when I’m Failing it’s because I’m emotionally stuck, logjammed, trapped, unwilling or unable to really see. when I do manage to see, I pretty much always find that I already know what I should’ve been doing. Often I already even tweeted it

when stuck I seem to default to a bad loop of “I just need to find the correct answer”, but I’m searching in this tiny box of collapsed awareness, where I can’t find the answer that I’d otherwise find. Often I look for a clever, complex answer when a simple one would suffice https://t.co/GIUguH3B6l

I’d half-jokingly say here “simply apply the correct answer generator to the question of how not to misuse the correct answer generator”- and it actually does give correct answers!

but the issue still just climbs up another level with me

I still have to apply the answers

eg let’s say we notice the problem always begins with collapsed awareness 

so step 1 of “how to not misuse the correct answer generator” might be, “first, expand your awareness”

(or “be here now” or “be present” or whatever people say these days”)

it’s ~correct but…

if I’m noticing the meta of “hmm awareness tends to be collapsed”, im in a relatively good place already 

when I’m in a bad place emotionally I don’t notice much at all (including the emotions), and it’s hard to notice that you’re not-noticing, hard to see that you’re not-seeing

so then part of the approach ought to lie beyond oneself- to rely on peers and an environment that help with the noticing. though again there’s the same pattern here; when I’m struggling emotionally I tend to want to hide away from my friends and family

most adults tend to sort of respectfully let you hide when you’re hiding emotionally, but toddlers don’t know or care to give a shit about that, and so toddlers are great for getting you to face your feelings. my 2yo will walk up to my face and ask point-blank “are you happy?”
are you happy?
it’s ok to be sad
@schemathingz this tracks for me too!
@LughSpear I’d say it’s the better thing!

thread:
All the psychology sauce you need/want is quite literally just found in going after ur goals. it is ver sinple

On ur way there (if u actually go), u will realize 99.99999% of whats stopping u is ur psyche. the answers r found when u just try to fix ur own shit (by going after

U can only study/learn about something if there's a directionality attached to it. Without a target, there is no baseline/metric/foundation for comparison. there is no good or bad, up or down. U literally can't learn anything useful about anything, because you have no USE for it.

Then when u find someone trying to do what u did u can say "here's what worked for me" & they may try it and actually find that it works. Pretty fucking wild if u think about it. We're all in the same exact minefield, and some people have already found the solves to the exact

Guy 1: "hey here's the mental sound I told MY inner tones that allowed me to type on my robot brain to earn shekels so i can afford gas for my fleshvehicle. It's fklmdivofidpk"

guy 2: fklmdivofidpk. oh wow it worked, thanks!

Like bruh

text:
Fuck "the way it's supposed to be done". Do it how YOU THE FUCK WANNA DO IT. That is how you add SPEED to your life, and genuinely leapfrog the trajectory/progress you're making INSTANTANEOUSLY

people telling u to cold email but u can just pick up the phone & rip? Do that.

THE SYNCHRONICITIES ARE FIRING

THE WORMHOLE HAS BEEN OPENED
 
JUMP THE FUCK IN & HOLD ON TO YOUR MASCARA SIS

WE’RE GOING FOR A RIDE

imagine letting a random fucking obstacle (with no thumbs) stop YOU (someone with thumbs) from getting what they want

Embarrassing

First time u do anything difficult, will take way longer than u "feel" like it should (as u learn all u didn't know u didn't know)

Then 2nd time, will be tremendously faster

3rd time will be lightning

Realize if ur just starting & it's hard

Will never be that hard again
Hurry up & do the abnormal so you can then do the impossible

When you’re making shit happen it will often feel like 1 step forward 2 steps back, an ANNOYING amount of times

U just need to keep taking the unforeseen bumps 2 the chin & keep fucking pushing. continually fight for every uphill inch - over & over & over & over. You’ll be like

"what do I do when i'm stuck between two choices!"

Uhhhhh..... you pick one......

"but i don't know if its the right one!"

And you never will. Would u like hug now?
